t_ch: 他简直——走了一条最短路线？
t_en: He somehow... took the fastest way through?

t_ch: 哎，实验又失败了。
t_en: *sigh* The experiment failed again.

t_ch: 可惜加不了对照组了……
t_en: It's a shame we can't add a control group...

t_ch: 这个波动值似乎不太对。
t_en: This fluctuation here doesn't seem quite right.

t_ch: 奇怪，怎么复现不了？
t_en: That's weird. Why can't the results be reproduced?

t_ch: …看来这个推论无法成立。
t_en: ...Seems like this hypothesis is unfounded.

t_ch: 设备怎么还没批下来？
t_en: Why hasn't the device been approved yet?

t_ch: 是你啊，年轻人。谢谢你们帮我把消息带回来，找我有什么事吗？
t_en: Ah, young one. Thank you for bringing word of them. What brings you here?

t_ch: 我来看看你的情况。
t_en: Just checking how you're doing.

t_ch: 过得还好吗？
t_en: How are you managing?

t_ch: 唉…谢谢你，真是个好孩子…要是你现在不忙的话，就陪老头子我聊聊天吧？
t_en: Ohh... Thank you, such a kind child... Do you have some time to chat with an old man if you're not too busy?

t_ch: 你说这人啊，就是奇怪。明明之前和那两个丫头也不时常联络，但自从…我反而天天有一肚子话想说……
t_en: It's funny how people work. I rarely kept in touch with my two girls before, but now they're... well, I have so many things I wish I could tell them...

t_ch: 你知道吗，那姐妹俩从小就爱惹事…我省吃俭用给她们送进了学堂，想着要是做个学者、多和书籍打打交道，是不是就能稍微消停点了？
t_en: Those two were quite the handful growing up... I saved every penny to send them to school, thinking maybe if they became scholars and spent more time with books, they'd settle down a bit.

t_ch: 可她们每次回来，和我聊起在树庭的生活，说的却净是些乱七八糟的玩意…什么「偷读课外读物的小技巧」啊、什么「如何替人签到赚外快」啊……
t_en: But every time they came home and told me about life in the Grove, it was nothing but crazy stories... about "secretly reading forbidden books" or "getting paid to fake attendance"...

t_ch: 你说说、你说说，在树庭那种地方，还能把日子过得这么鸡飞狗跳，我怎么就养出这么两个天赋异禀的丫头！
t_en: Just imagine — making such a mess even in a place like the Grove! How in the world did I raise two daughters with such special talents for mischief!?

t_ch: 节哀…
t_en: I'm sorry for your loss...

t_ch: 嗨，没事、没事…其实我都想通了。你看，她们虽然并非预言中的黄金裔，但依然活出了自己的人生不是吗？我完全不必替她们感到遗憾。
t_en: No, no, it's alright... I've already made peace with it. They might not have been the destined Chrysos Heirs, but they lived life their own way, you know? I'm proud of who they were.

t_ch: 现在唯一可惜的，就是我这把年纪，怕是没办法亲自去树庭走一趟喽。
t_en: All I regret is that these old bones won't let me travel to the Grove anymore.

t_ch: 据说小提图斯打听到了他家老头子的消息，前两天已经跟着探险队出发了。
t_en: I heard young Titus got word about his old man and left with the expedition team a few days ago.

t_ch: 他也好、我也好，即便明知被黑潮吞噬的人什么都剩不下，却依旧…想要去找找他们最后留下的痕迹……
t_en: He's like me — we both know the black tide doesn't leave anything behind, but still... we want to find whatever that's left of them...

t_ch: 我可以替你去看看。
t_en: I could go on your behalf.

t_ch: 什——真、真的吗？如果可以的话…不行，还是算了吧，太危险了。
t_en: What— You mean it? I mean... No, that's asking too much. It's too risky.

t_ch: 非常感谢，年轻人，但请千万别为了我这种糟老头子，置自己的安危于不顾。
t_en: I really appreciate it, young one, but don't put yourself in danger for an old grandpa like me.

t_ch: 放心，完全不带怕的。
t_en: No worries. I can handle anything.

t_ch: 我可是银河球棒侠！
t_en: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

t_ch: 我实在不知该如何感谢你，年轻人…请务必注意安全，我等你顺利归来！
t_en: I... I can't thank you enough! Please be careful out there, and make sure you come back to us safely!

t_ch: 对了…我…我还有个不情之请。如果方便的话，可以拜托你顺带留意一下小提图斯的情况吗？我和他家老头子也算交情不浅，着实有些放心不下。
t_en: And... one more thing, if I may. Could you possibly check on young Titus too? His father's an old friend, and I'm concerned.

t_ch: 辛苦你了……
t_en: Thank you for all this...

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 谢谢你能陪我这么久，我感觉好多了，你要是还有事就去忙吧。
t_en: Thanks for staying with me this while. I'm feeling better now. Don't let me keep you if you have things to do.

t_ch: 据说小提图斯打听到了他家老头子的消息，前两天已经跟着探险队出发了。
t_en: I heard young Titus got word about his old man and left with the expedition team a few days ago.

t_ch: 他也好、我也好，即便明知被黑潮吞噬的人什么都剩不下，却依旧…想要去找找他们最后留下的痕迹……
t_en: He's like me — we both know the black tide doesn't leave anything behind, but still... we want to find whatever that's left of them...

t_ch: 我可以替你去看看。
t_en: I could go on your behalf.

t_ch: 什——真、真的吗？如果可以的话…不行，还是算了吧，太危险了。
t_en: What— You mean it? I mean... No, that's asking too much. It's too risky.

t_ch: 非常感谢，年轻人，但请千万别为了我这种糟老头子，置自己的安危于不顾。
t_en: I really appreciate it, young one, but don't put yourself in danger for an old grandpa like me.

t_ch: 放心，完全不带怕的。
t_en: No worries. I can handle anything.

t_ch: 我可是银河球棒侠！
t_en: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

t_ch: 我实在不知该如何感谢你，年轻人…请务必注意安全，我等你顺利归来！
t_en: I... I can't thank you enough! Please be careful out there, and make sure you come back to us safely!

t_ch: 对了…我…我还有个不情之请。如果方便的话，可以拜托你顺带留意一下小提图斯的情况吗？我和他家老头子也算交情不浅，着实有些放心不下。
t_en: And... one more thing, if I may. Could you possibly check on young Titus too? His father's an old friend, and I'm concerned.

t_ch: 辛苦你了……
t_en: Thank you for all this...

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 谢谢你能陪我这么久，我感觉好多了，你要是还有事就去忙吧。
t_en: Thanks for staying with me this while. I'm feeling better now. Don't let me keep you if you have things to do.

t_ch: 你记得自己「阅读」过这段回忆：身为黄金裔的姐姐奋力抵抗，却没能挡住黑衣剑士的一击；而不善战斗的妹妹执起姐姐的剑，站在尚有余温的尸身与怪物之间。
t_en: You recall "reading" this memory: The elder sister, a Chrysos Heir, fought courageously but couldn't survive the black-clad swordmaster's blow. Her younger sister, though no warrior, took up the fallen blade and stood guard over her sister's barely-cold body against the monsters.

t_ch: 现在，你想再重温一遍那时的情景吗？
t_en: Would you like to revisit that moment now?

t_ch: 我想再看看。
t_en: Yes, please.

t_ch: 算了吧。
t_en: I'll pass.

t_ch: 为什么…仅仅是一击…黑衣执剑，那是个什么样的怪物…！
t_en: One strike... that's all it took... What kind of monster is that black-clad swordsman...!?

t_ch: …可恶，它离开了…少了阿塔卡玛姐姐，战线已经在逐渐崩溃了……
t_en: They've vanished... Without you, Artakama, our defenses crumble... We can't hold...

t_ch: 库娜涅…快逃吧……
t_en: Run, Cynane... Save yourself...

t_ch: 不…我一定要救你出去，我们不能死在这里。
t_en: No! I'm not leaving without you. This won't be our end!

t_ch: 别…听我的，直接离开吧……
t_en: No... Listen to me. Just go...

t_ch: 别说话了，姐姐！你可是黄金裔啊！
t_en: Don't talk like that! You're a Chrysos Heir, remember?

t_ch: 从小我就羡慕你的黄金裔身份，一直踩着你的脚印前进…你怎么能倒在这里！
t_en: I've spent my whole life chasing your shadow, looking up to your golden blood... Don't you dare give up now!

t_ch: 来，试试把手挂到我的肩膀……
t_en: Here, try grabbing onto my shoulder...

t_ch: …库娜涅，转头看看吧……
t_en: Cynane... behind you...

t_ch: …怎么会，黑潮怪物围过来了…什么时候把大家都……
t_en: No... When did the black tide monsters... The others... they're all...

t_ch: 叫你走…不肯走…你从小就不听话……
t_en: You never listen... just like when we were kids...

t_ch: 姐姐，你还真是五十步笑百步呢。我们两个，哪个不叫老爹操碎心？说起来，小时候还是你带着我到处惹事……
t_en: Guess we're both troublemakers, sis. Dad never caught a break with either of us, did he? Remember how you used to drag me into your schemes...

t_ch: …姐姐？
t_en: ...Sis?

t_ch: …没关系了，姐姐，都一样的。老爹会为我们骄傲的。
t_en: It doesn't matter anymore, sis... We'll all end in the same way. Dad would be proud of us.

t_ch: 黑潮怪物…想要伤害阿塔卡玛，倒是试试看啊！
t_en: Back off, you black tide creature! If you want Artakama, you'll have to go through me first!

t_ch: 是盗火行者……
t_en: It's the Flame Reaver...

t_ch: 义愤与悲悯如同两股相向的气流席卷而来，在你周身掀起一阵飓风，并不剧烈，却令你感到有些呼吸困难。
t_en: Twin currents of righteous anger and deep compassion clash within you, stirring up an emotional tempest that, while not violent, leaves you struggling for breath.

t_ch: 愿这对姐妹在塞纳托斯的怀抱中得到安眠。
t_en: May the girls find their final rest in Thanatos' embrace.

t_ch: 黑潮怪物的尸骸毫无生气地散落一地。此刻它这副安静的模样，让人很难想象其在尚可活动时，是多么的危险与疯狂。
t_en: The lifeless remains of black tide monsters lie scattered about. Their current stillness makes it hard to imagine how dangerous and frenzied they were while still active.

t_ch: 人们被黑潮造就的怪物杀死、死后又被黑潮转化为新的怪物——纵然对黑潮与它的造物你已然不再陌生，这样的事实依旧令你感到不安。
t_en: Humans are slain by monsters created in the black tide, and they in turn are turned by the tide into new monsters — Though you're now no stranger to the black tide and its offsprings, the thought still sends chills down your spine.

t_ch: 你不由想象，在生命最后一刻，那对姐妹究竟是怀着怎样的心情去面对如此的绝望……
t_en: You find yourself wondering what final thoughts crossed these sisters' minds as they faced such utter despair...

t_ch: 一把刃尖破损、但整体尚且完好的剑，剑身上布满黑褐脏污，让人几乎难以分辨其原貌。
t_en: A broken-tipped sword, still largely whole, lies coated in stains that mask its original appearance.

t_ch: 你小心翼翼地将其拎起，突然福至心灵——或许在刚刚的那段记忆中，挡在姐姐与怪物之间的妹妹，拿起的就是这把剑？
t_en: You pick it up carefully, then it dawns on you — could this be the blade the younger girl raised in her last defiant stand?

t_ch: 你猜你可以将它交还给老费贝尔。不过在那之前，你还记得那位老人的委托——该去找找提图斯了。
t_en: You decide to bring this back to Old Fabio. Though first, there's the old man's request to tend to — You should go find Titus.

t_ch: …嗯？你是…哦，是你啊。你怎么在这？这地方不太安全，最好别停留太久。
t_en: Eh? Who's... oh, it's you. What brings you to this place? It's not safe here — best not linger.

t_ch: 那你怎么在这？
t_en: Then why are you hanging around?

t_ch: 你以为我想待在这种鬼地方吗？还不是我家那老东西，自己走得倒是轻巧，留下的烂摊子可不少。
t_en: You think I want to be in this forsaken place? That old coot may have gone, but he left plenty of loose ends for me to tie up.

t_ch: 我是来找你的。
t_en: I'm here to find you.

t_ch: 啊…？你…唉，谢谢你，朋友。不过别担心，我是跟着探险队过来的，那帮人虽然贵得要死，但保证我的安全还是没什么问题的。
t_en: Huh...? You... *sigh* I appreciate it, my friend, but I'm okay — got an expedition team with me. They cost an arm and a leg, but they'll keep me safe.

t_ch: 你说这人，一把年纪了，非得窝在树庭瞎折腾，让他回奥赫玛就跟要了他的命似的。
t_en: That stubborn old fool, always clinging to the Grove, treating Okhema like it's poison to him.

t_ch: 现在可好， 就为了跑这一趟，我攒了三年的假期一下子都赔进去了不说，小金库也差不多要见底了……
t_en: Now thanks to this little trip, I've burned through three years of saved vacation time, and my poor piggy bank's almost empty...

t_ch: 哎，对了朋友，我听说…你能使用欧洛尼斯的神力，对吧？
t_en: Say, my friend — they say you can wield Oronyx's divine power, is that true?

t_ch: 那你能帮个忙吗？帮我找找这附近有没有那个老头子留下的东西——算我欠你个人情，价钱什么的也都好说……
t_en: If so, could you help me out? Check if the old man left anything behind — I'll owe you one, and we can discuss payment...

t_ch: 嘶…不好意思，我现在身上只有这些，但之后回了奥赫玛，你要是有什么需要都可以找我帮忙！
t_en: S—Sorry... it's not much, but once I'm back in Okhema, just name your price!

t_ch: 不用给我钱…
t_en: No need to pay me...

t_ch: 千万别推辞，你要是不收下，我也没法安心，真的。
t_en: Please, I insist. I won't feel right if you don't take it, really.

t_ch: 包在我身上！
t_en: You can count on it!

t_ch: 拜托你啦，朋友，我等你好消息！
t_en: Thank you, my friend! Looking forward to hearing from you!

t_ch: …怎么样，有什么发现吗？
t_en: ...Any luck? Did you discover something?

t_ch: 你记得自己「阅读」过这段回忆：在汹涌黑潮与无尽的怪物来袭之际，老人只身守在友爱之馆，从容而悲壮，试图以书籍的力量对抗塞纳托斯的呼唤。
t_en: You recall "reading" this memory: When the raging black tide and its countless monsters came, the old man guarded the Library of Philia all alone, noble yet doomed as he attempted to use the might of books against Thanatos' beckoning.

t_ch: 现在，你想再重温一遍那时的情景吗？
t_en: Would you like to revisit that moment now?

t_ch: 我想再看看。
t_en: Yes, please.

t_ch: 算了吧。
t_en: I'll pass.

t_ch: …老提图斯，你动作快些，慈爱之庭已经失守，晚了就走不了了。
t_en: ...Old Titus, you must get moving. The Courtyard of Storge has been lost. You must leave now before it's too late.

t_ch: 呵…你不也不打算逃走么，那刻夏？
t_en: Hah... But you're planning to stand your ground as well, Anaxa.

t_ch: 第一，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，什么叫「也」？你的意思…你想死在树庭？当真老糊涂了？
t_en: First, call me Anaxagoras. Second, what do you mean "as well"? Do you mean... you want to die here in the Grove? Have you gone senile?

t_ch: 那刻夏，我以前和你辩论的时候或许不曾提起：我很早就志愿为树庭奉献自己的一生。
t_en: Anaxa, I may have not mentioned this in my previous debates with you, but I vowed to dedicate my life to the Grove long ago.

t_ch: 年轻时我因家庭暂时放弃了这个理想，好在到了这个岁数，还能有机会在树庭燃烧智慧。如今黑潮覆灭树庭将即，我便也无处可去了。
t_en: I temporarily gave up on this ideal when I was young because I had a family. Fortunately, I had the opportunity to re-ignite my wisdom here in my old age. Now that the black tide has come to destroy it, I have nowhere left to go.

t_ch: 你的逻辑可真是一团浆糊。我知道你儿子在奥赫玛混得不错，何来无处可去一说？
t_en: Your logic makes no sense! I know your son is getting by pretty well in Okhema. What do you mean, "you have nowhere to go"?

t_ch: 那…阿那克萨戈拉斯，你我都明白，像我这般腿脚只能是拖累。你一路护送我至图书馆，身上平添了多少本不该有的伤痕？
t_en: Then tell me, Anaxagoras... You and I both know very well that legs like mine will only slow us down. How many unnecessary wounds did you suffer just escorting me to the library?

t_ch: 黑潮来势汹汹，连卡林尼库斯那样的黄金裔都阵亡了。我就不奢望能离开了…只愿死前能再读一读树庭的藏书。
t_en: The black tide descends with brutal ferocity. Even a great Chrysos Heir like Callinicus lost their life to it. I don't expect that I would be able to leave. I simply wish to sit and read in the Grove library one last time.

t_ch: …冥顽不灵。也罢，咱俩的辩论从来都没能分个高低。这最后一次，我让你赢。
t_en: ...You stubborn old fool. Have it your way. We were never able to decide a victor in our debates. Let's count this final one as your victory.

t_ch: 冥界再见吧，老提图斯…保重。
t_en: Let us meet again in the nether realm, Old Titus... Take care.

t_ch: 总算清静了…让我看看，这帮小兔崽子有没有又往典藏里放些大逆不道的东西……
t_en: Finally, it's quiet again... Let me see, I wonder if these brats have been sneaking impure content into the collection...

t_ch: …果然。《一拳神王•艾格勒卷》？哼，换作以前，我见一本销毁一本。
t_en: ...Just as I expected. One Punch God: Aquila? Hmph, if this were the old days, I'd have burned this on sight.

t_ch: …《禁忌之恋：树与蝶》？气煞我了，哪个渎神的混账放的？
t_en: ...Forbidden Love: The Tree and the Butterfly? Damnations, which blasphemous fool put this here?

t_ch: …也罢。我家那兔崽子小时候也老爱看这种东西，都被我训怕了。
t_en: ...Whatever. The little brat at home used to love this kind of stuff. I scared that out of him, though.

t_ch: 这最后的时间里，我倒要看看这些学术渣滓到底有什么魅力。
t_en: In my final moments, I'd like to see just what is so special about this brain rotting nonsense.

t_ch: 哈哈哈！成何体统，成何体统！
t_en: Hahaha! Scandalous, just scandalous!

t_ch: 黑潮怪物…别动我们的藏书…！
t_en: Beasts of the black tide... I won't allow you to touch our collection!

t_ch: 你将自己在记忆中所见的情形，事无巨细地复述给了眼前的男人。
t_en: You tell the man everything you saw in the memory, describing each moment in precise detail.

t_ch: …呸！什么叫无处可去…就真老糊涂了是吧？瞎话都不会编了……
t_en: Nowhere to go? What nonsense! Has he truly lost his mind? Can't even make up a decent excuse...

t_ch: 你知道吗，就他那腿脚——上次我不小心给他那破烟斗弄坏了，老东西撵我撵了整整半个树庭！
t_en: And those legs he complains about? Last time I accidentally broke his favorite pipe, he chased me through half the Grove!

t_ch: 这就成拖累了，啊？该犟的时候反而不知道犟了…这个死脑筋，每次吵架的时候，怎么就没见他这么体贴人？
t_en: Now suddenly he's a burden? Ha! When he should be stubborn, he gives in... That old fool, where was all this consideration during our arguments?

t_ch: 哈…当初就不该妥协，直接把人绑回圣城得了…花大价钱买到的房子，就在市集和浴场中间，去哪都方便，还特意给他在院子里整了个小图书馆……
t_en: Gods, I should've just dragged him back home with me... I got him this perfect house, right between the marketplace and the baths. Premium location, didn't spare any expense. Even built him a private library in the courtyard...

t_ch: 知道用了多少心思、砸了多少钱吗！老东西，就知道浪费！心疼得我声音都打颤了……
t_en: All that care... all that money... Do you know how much money I wasted for that, old fool? Gods! It hurts just talking about it...

t_ch: …你倒是…呜，先住住看啊……
t_en: Why didn't you... *sniff* try staying in that house for once...

t_ch: 男人怒气冲冲的抱怨渐渐化作隐约的哽咽，那声音继而又变为难以遏制的啜泣。
t_en: The anger in his voice shatters like glass, grief pouring through as his shoulders shake with silent sobs.

t_ch: 你突然觉得胸口有点不舒服——就像是衣服浸了水、沉甸甸黏在身上的那种感觉……
t_en: You suddenly feel a pressure on your chest — like your clothes suddenly all became drenched in water and are sticking suffocatingly to your skin...

t_ch: 节哀…
t_en: I'm sorry for your loss...

t_ch: 哈…哈哈…多谢关心。不用担心，麻烦…让我一个人静静吧。
t_en: *bitter, choked laugh* Thanks, really... but I'll be fine. Could you... could you just give me a moment?

t_ch: 我这么年轻，我还不想死！
t_en: I'm still young. I don't wanna die!

t_ch: 反物质军团怎么就突然来了，我不会要死在这里吧？爸爸，妈妈，亲爱的…我好想你们。
t_en: Why did the Antimatter Legion suddenly come here? I don't wanna die here! Mom, dad, my sweet angel... I miss you so much.

t_ch: 我、我还这么年轻，我还要在空间站发光发热呢，我不想死啊！
t_en: I, I'm too young to die! I've got things I still want to achieve on this space station.

t_ch: 哎，又得还贷……
t_en: Tsk, time to make another loan repayment...

t_ch: 这玩意怎么这么贵啊？我把经费全砸进去了。
t_en: Why is this so expensive! I've thrown all my funding at it.

t_ch: 网上还好意思说什么「买新不买旧」。哎，我要是有钱就好了…到时候再买点超导合金，然后我用一份就丢一份……
t_en: And they're always spamming you online to "buy new, not second-hand." I wish I were rich... I'd buy loads of superconductors and just throw them away once I'm done with them...

t_ch: 早知道我就先问你了。
t_en: I'd have asked you earlier if I knew.

t_ch: 买都买了，就先用着呗。
t_en: You've already bought it, so put it to use.

t_ch: 原来你做过这个实验啊，不早说！早知道我就先问你了。
t_en: Why didn't you tell me that you've done this experiment before? I could've just asked you.

t_ch: 你是不知道啊，我前两天买了个二手设备，预算直接爆掉了，总感觉买贵了。
t_en: I didn't tell you but I bought a second-hand device a couple of days ago and it blew out my budget. I feel like I paid too much.

t_ch: 这玩意对刚需人士来说什么价格都一样。
t_en: Any price is the same for someone who really needs it.

t_ch: 反正你买都买了，就凑合着用呗，实验可耽误不得。
t_en: Anyway, you've bought it, now so just put it to use. This experiment cannot wait.

t_ch: 哎呦，太好了——年轻人，你可算回来了！风堇小姐才刚来过，得知你独自去了树庭，她很担心你的安全。
t_en: Oh thank goodness — you're back, young one! Miss Hyacine was just here, worried sick about you going to the Grove alone.

t_ch: 怎么样，没受伤吧！
t_en: Are you hurt? Tell me you're alright!

t_ch: 完全没有。
t_en: Not a scratch.

t_ch: 这点事根本难不倒我！
t_en: It was no challenge at all!

t_ch: 那就好、那就好，一路辛苦了…所以…你有找到什么吗？
t_en: Oh, that's good to hear. You've done well... So... were you able to find anything?

t_ch: 刻法勒在上…这、这是……
t_en: By Kephale above... Th—This is...

t_ch: 你将在记忆中的见闻转告给了老费贝尔——告诉他阿塔卡玛是如何英勇奋战到生命的最后一刻，库娜涅又是如何举起长剑，坚定守护在姐姐身前的。
t_en: You tell Old Fabio everything you saw in the memory — how Artakama fought bravely until her last breath, and how Cynane raised her sword, standing firm to protect her sister.

t_ch: 这位憔悴的老父亲只是沉默地聆听着，将那柄剑紧抱在怀中，任凭浊泪在脸上纵横。
t_en: The weary father listens in silence, clutching the sword tightly to his chest as tears stream down his face.

t_ch: …谢…轻人，谢…呜…谢……
t_en: Th... thank... you... *sob*... thank...

t_ch: 他似乎仍在试图向你道谢，却因泣不成声而只能挤出些许断断续续的含混音节。
t_en: He seems to be trying to express his gratitude, but only manages to vocalize broken and confused syllables through his sobs.

t_ch: 这种时候，最好还是让他一个人静静吧。
t_en: Best to give him some space with his grief.

t_ch: 老犟种、老倔牛！
t_en: That bullheaded old man! Stubborn as a mule!

t_ch: 库娜涅似乎从姐姐的身边拾起了什么…你猜那或许是一把武器。
t_en: It looks as if Cynane is taking something from her sister's body... You imagine it must be some kind of weapon.

t_ch: 呀，灰宝！你来啦。
t_en: Oh, Grayie! Good to see you!

t_ch: 有什么事就直说吧。
t_en: What is it?

t_ch: 需要我帮忙吗？
t_en: You need something?

t_ch: 嗯，是这样的。在治疗那位来自树庭的伤者时，我发现了一封信，似乎是某位学者给妻子的家书。
t_en: Well, you see. During my treatment of a wounded from the Grove, I found a letter that appeared to be from a scholar to his wife.

t_ch: 当时他的伤势太重，我抽不开身，如今稍得了些空闲，便打算亲自将信送过去。
t_en: His situation was critical and I couldn't step away, but now that things are quieter, I'd like to personally deliver this letter.

t_ch: 然后我就想起来，灰宝不是和那刻夏老师一起去慰问过那些牺牲者的家属嘛，树庭的悲剧才过去没多久，我有点担心他们的生活状况。
t_en: Then I remembered that you and Professor Anaxa checked on the bereaved families before, and since the Grove incident is still recent, I'm worried about these families' situations.

t_ch: 有空的话，能不能替我跑一趟，去瞧瞧其他人呢？
t_en: If you're not too busy, could you spare some time to see how they are doing?

t_ch: 不用特意做什么，只要和他们聊几句，了解一下近况就行！拜托你啦，灰宝——
t_en: No need for anything formal. Just talk to them and see how they're holding up! What do you say, Grayie? Pretty please—

t_ch: …老东西…知道我给你准备的房子，花了多少钱吗？你倒是…先住住看啊……
t_en: You stubborn old man... Do you even know how much that house cost? Why didn't you... *sniff* try staying in there for once...

t_ch: 呜呜……
t_en: *sniffles*...

t_ch: 爷好饿啊……
t_en: I'm so hungry...

t_ch: 你不是说要减肥？
t_en: I thought you said you're trying to lose weight...

t_ch: 我已不是过去的我！
t_en: I'm not the same as I used to be!

t_ch: 那要蒜香还是椒盐？
t_en: So do you want garlic salt, or salt & pepper?

t_ch: 我真的快要饿晕了，这就是脑力劳动带来的负担吗？
t_en: I'm really starving here. Is this the true burden of mental exhaustion?

t_ch: 可是你昨天还嚷嚷着要减肥……
t_en: But you were just hollering yesterday about wanting to lose weight...

t_ch: 昨天的我要减肥，和今天的我有什么关系？
t_en: What does my wanting to lose weight yesterday have to do with what I feel today?

t_ch: …那你要吃蒜香还是椒盐的？我帮你叫点餐机器人过来。
t_en: ... So do you want garlic salt, or salt & pepper? I'll call the robot waiter over.

t_ch: 椰冻奶盖拿铁最好喝！
t_en: Coconut milk lattes are the best!

t_ch: 芋波香芒啡也超好喝！
t_en: Taro bubble mango coffee is very nice too!

t_ch: 那我这次喝这个吧！
t_en: I'll drink this one this time!

t_ch: 嗯…五点一条去结账吧。
t_en: Mmm... one for 5 credits, please.

s_en: Researcher Who Pretends to Be Excited
t_ch: 咳咳…我再试一次：「椰冻奶盖拿铁最好喝！」
t_en: Ahem... let me try again: "Coconut milk lattes are the best!"

t_ch: 没有大问题，但细节可以调优。你跟我学：「芋波香芒啡也超好喝！」
t_en: That's pretty good, but it can be fine-tuned. Say it with me: "Taro bubble mango coffee is very nice too!"

s_en: Researcher Who Pretends to Be Excited
t_ch: 我大概懂了…「哇！那我这次喝你这个吧！这家的咖啡真是永远都喝不腻！」
t_en: I think I get it... "Wow! I'll drink this one this time! I never get sick of the coffee at this place!"

t_ch: 可以了，就这样吧。重申一下价格：喊一句给五个信用点。
t_en: Yes, that's the one. Reiterate the price: Shout it out once for 5 credits.

t_ch: 万一我出了什么意外……
t_en: If something should happen to me...

t_ch: 别说这种话！
t_en: Don't say that!

t_ch: 我还是没忍住，一口气买了足足十份商业保险。
t_en: I couldn't help myself and bought ten whole insurance policies.

t_ch: 哈？为什么？你疯了吗？
t_en: Huh? How come? Are you nuts?

t_ch: 之前军团入侵，我们科有个老哥去世了，这让我有些触动……
t_en: Back before the Legion invaded, an old departmental veteran passed away. It really stirred up some feelings...

t_ch: 所以我就买了这么多，还把你名字写在了受益人那栏里。
t_en: So I bought all of these and listed your name in the beneficiary column.

t_ch: 万一哪一天，我遭遇不测…你和「小宝」至少还能靠这笔钱好好活下去。
t_en: In case something ever happens to me one day... at least you and our Little Precious can use this to keep on living.

t_ch: 别说这种晦气话！呸呸呸！
t_en: Don't say such terrible things! Bah!

t_ch: 报告写完了吗？
t_en: Is the report done?

t_ch: 哎，这事说来话长。
t_en: Ack, it's a long story.

t_ch: 之前要你写的那份研究报告呢？写得怎么样了？
t_en: That report I asked you to write before... how is it?

t_ch: 前天就写完了，但这事吧，哎…说来话长了。
t_en: I finished it two days back, but y'know... well, it's a long story.

t_ch: 所以究竟是什么情况？
t_en: So what exactly is going on?

t_ch: 我们在开研讨会的时候，正好赶上反物质军团入侵。坐我前面那个老哥身上都挂彩了，我都快吓死了。
t_en: Just as we were running a seminar, the Antimatter Legion invaded. The old fella sitting in front of me was wounded in action, and I was scared half to death.

t_ch: 哎，真不容易，你们人没事就好。
t_en: Wow, that's rough. Thank goodness you're okay.

t_ch: 确实，就是感觉有点倒霉，回头还得重写一份呢。
t_en: Yeah, just a little unlucky. I need to re-write it.

t_ch: 我觉得你那个结论不太对。
t_en: I thought your conclusion was a bit off there.

t_ch: 这怎么可能！
t_en: What do you mean!?

t_ch: 老实说，我觉得你推导出来的结论不太对啊。
t_en: To be honest, I think the conclusion that you derived isn't quite right.

t_ch: 怎么就不对了？
t_en: How is it not right?

t_ch: 你看你前面引用的文献，这个…还有这个…都是过时的条文。
t_en: The literature you cited here, right here... and here... they're all from outdated texts.

t_ch: 停停停，什么叫「过时」？这都是最新的条文，你不信去查查。
t_en: Hold on a minute. What does "outdated" mean? These are all the latest up-to-date articles. Go take a look if you don't believe me.

t_ch: 目前为止的确是最新的，但到你把论文发出来，这个时间内可能会改动，所以我说你这个研究不够严谨。
t_en: That's right. They are currently the latest, up-to-date articles. But by the time the paper's published they could have been changed — so that's why I'm saying. Your research simply isn't rigorous enough.

t_ch: 老哥，帮个忙吧！
t_en: C'mon bro, help me out here!

t_ch: 这我可帮不了你。
t_en: My hands are tied.

t_ch: 哎，老哥，帮个忙吧！就借我一次，我核验完论文就还你。
t_en: Bro, c'mon — help me out here! Just loan it to me once, and I'll just check it against the paper and give it straight back to you.

t_ch: 不行，绝对不行，你要借就老老实实排队。
t_en: No way. Absolutely not. If you want to borrow something, wait in line like everyone else.

t_ch: 我这不是急着用嘛！我和你什么交情啊，你都忘了是吧？
t_en: I'm in a hurry here! Aren't we supposed to be friends? Have you forgotten that?

t_ch: 光我们应物科，就有不少人在排队轮候呢，这么多人盯着，我怎么敢徇私让你插队。
t_en: At our Department of Implement Arts alone, there're loads of people waiting in line. How could I let you cut in when so many people are watching?

t_ch: 行，那我再想想别的办法吧。
t_en: Okay, then I'll just have to think of another way.

t_ch: 功效真的这么神奇？
t_en: Is it really that miraculous?

t_ch: 一看就知道是智商税。
t_en: Looks like it's just gonna fool the foolish.

t_ch: 你说这玩意，它的功效真的有广告上这么神奇？
t_en: Speaking of this thing — is it really as miraculous as they say in the ad?

t_ch: 算了吧，一看就知道是智商税。
t_en: Forget about it. Looks like it's just gonna fool the foolish.

t_ch: 但这个牌子我知道，做医药起家的，很有名。
t_en: But I know this brand. They started out in medicine before making it big.

t_ch: 大牌子又怎么样，越是知名品牌，就越爱搞这种虚头巴脑的！
t_en: Who cares what brand it is. The bigger brands are the ones more likely to engage in this stupid hipster stuff!

t_ch: 这是又换了个包装？
t_en: Have they changed the packet again?

t_ch: 还没降价，我再等等好了。
t_en: Still not on sale yet... I'm holding out.

t_ch: 哎，还没修好吗？
t_en: *Sigh* Haven't you fixed it yet?

t_ch: 别急，等机组换新吧。
t_en: Don't worry. I'm waiting on a new part.

t_ch: 哎，这实验没办法推进下去啊…这都大半个月了，机组还没修好吗？
t_en: Ack, my experiment can't go on without it... It's been two weeks already. Can't they fix it?

t_ch: 您老别急啊，我已经问过维修科的人了。
t_en: Don't worry about it. I've chased up the maintenance department.

t_ch: 他们怎么说？能给个确切的日期吗？
t_en: What did they say? Can you give me an exact date?

t_ch: 机组已经没办法修了，所以我找公司那边定损了，现在申请了一批新设备。您老先休息几天，等机组换新吧。
t_en: The part can no longer be repaired, so I went to the IPC and applied for a replacement batch. You should rest up a few days and wait for the replacement to come.

t_ch: 你好，欢迎加入空间站。
t_en: Hello, and welcome to the space station.

t_ch: 前辈你好，请多指教。
t_en: Hello, senior. How do you do?

t_ch: 你还有闲心看书？
t_en: Are you still in the mood to read a book?

t_ch: 那不然呢？
t_en: What else could I be doing?

t_ch: 都什么时候了，你居然还有闲心看书？
t_en: It's getting late. You're still in the mood to read?

t_ch: 那不然呢？休息时间看小说有错吗？
t_en: What else? Is it wrong to read while on a break?

t_ch: 不是…你那个实验都被怪物毁了……
t_en: No... Your experiment was ruined by monsters...

t_ch: 这有什么，我都没急，你瞎急什么？
t_en: So what? I'm in no rush. What are you in a hurry for?

t_ch: 我这不是担心你嘛……
t_en: Don't worry about me. I'm worried about you...

t_ch: 还好她不在，难得清净会儿。
t_en: Luckily she isn't here. A rare moment of peace and quiet.

t_ch: 我从小就想当个科学家。
t_en: I've always wanted to be a scientist ever since I was little.

t_ch: 那你也算是梦想成真了。
t_en: Then your dream has pretty much come true.

t_ch: 说出来你别笑我…我从小就立志要当个科学家，在作文里还夸下海口说我要加入天才俱乐部。
t_en: Don't laugh at me, but... I've been determined to become a scientist since I was a kid. I even used to brag in my homework about joining the Genius Society.

t_ch: 这有什么可笑的，我小时候还想当大明星呢。
t_en: What's so funny about that? I wanted to be a celebrity when I was younger.

t_ch: 想起来的时候，还有点害臊嘛，你看我这一事无成的……
t_en: It's still a little bit shameful to think about, especially when you consider how I never amounted to much...

t_ch: 你都来空间站了，也算是实现了小时候的梦想。
t_en: Hey. You're on the Herta Space Station. That's basically realizing your childhood dream.

t_ch: 这和我作文里立下的宏愿比，还差得远呢。
t_en: It's far from the magnificent aspirations in my homework.

t_ch: 刚来的时候，我还和它合过影。
t_en: When I first came here, I took a photo together with it.

t_ch: 它？你是说这玩意？
t_en: It? You mean this thing?

t_ch: 说出来你可能不信…在我刚入职的时候，我特地来这里跟它合了个影。
t_en: You may not believe me, but... when I first started working here, I came here specifically to take a photo with it.

t_ch: 它？哪个它？
t_en: It? Which one?

t_ch: 喏，就眼前这玩意呗。
t_en: Well, the thing right in front of you.

t_ch: 一个投影而已，至于吗？
t_en: It's just a projection, though. So what?

t_ch: 哎，你不懂我是我们家唯一一个坐过飞船的人，拍给家里人看看呗。
t_en: Hey, you have to understand — I'm the only one in my family to have ridden in a spaceship before. It's a photo for my family.

t_ch: 那他们现在肯定以你为荣吧。
t_en: Then they must be really proud of you right now.

t_ch: 哎，快忙晕了。
t_en: *Sigh* I'm crazy busy right now.

t_ch: 最近这么多人受伤，又要连轴转了。
t_en: So many people have been getting injured that we've had to work around the clock.

t_ch: 今天中午连午饭都没时间吃，哎，快忙晕了。
t_en: I didn't even have time to eat my lunch today. *Sigh* I'm crazy busy these days.

t_ch: 体检的请到我这里登记。
t_en: Please come over here and register for your medical examination.

t_ch: 这个二手辐射仪卖吗？
t_en: Is this second-hand radiometer for sale?

t_ch: 你出价多少？
t_en: How much are you offering?

t_ch: 我是实习科员……
t_en: I'm just an intern...

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: Why do you ask?

t_ch: 五十信用点卖我可以吗？
t_en: How about fifty credits? Is that fair?

t_ch: 最近很容易感觉疲惫。
t_en: It's so easy to get tired these days.

t_ch: 你这就是上岁数啦！
t_en: That's because you're getting on in age!

t_ch: 你的简报里怎么没有废话。
t_en: Why is there never any time for nonsense in your briefings?

t_ch: …有废话才奇怪吧。
t_en: ... Having nonsense would be the weird part.

t_ch: 但废话可以显得字数多。
t_en: But nonsense can sometimes stretch out your word count.

t_ch: 那有什么用？
t_en: What's the point of that?

t_ch: 体现你的科研态度啊！
t_en: It demonstrates your research prowess!

t_ch: 你想好怎么表白了吗？
t_en: Have you figured out how to express yourself?

t_ch: 没…没有。
t_en: No... not yet.

t_ch: 我上次教你的话术呢？
t_en: What about those public speaking tips I gave you last time?

t_ch: …我有点说不出口。
t_en: ... I'm a little speechless.

t_ch: 上次教给你的浪漫情话有效果吗？
t_en: Did that sappy spiel I taught you last time work at all?

t_ch: 那些话根本说不出口吧？
t_en: You can't say any of those things I taught you?

t_ch: 「你有感觉到震动吗？每次见到你，我的心脏都会疯狂地急速跳动。」这句难道不浪漫吗？不感动吗？
t_en: "Can you feel that vibration? Every time I see you, my heart starts pounding like crazy." Isn't that totally romantic? Aren't you impressed?

t_ch: 至少我听完之后，绝对不敢乱动。
t_en: Hearing it makes me not want to make any move at all.

t_ch: 哼，等着吧！
t_en: Hmm, hold on!

t_ch: 还差<unbreak>10</unbreak>个论点我就可以完成这篇报告了……
t_en: I'm still <unbreak>10</unbreak> talking points away from finishing this paper...

t_ch: 哼，等着吧！之前的我你们科室爱理不理，发表完这篇奇物报告的我，你们全都高攀不起！
t_en: Hmmm, just you wait! You bureaucrats never used to give a hoot about me, but once I've published this Curio research, you'll all be trying to hire me!

t_ch: 创新咖啡怎么赚外快？
t_en: How does an innovative new coffee end up making money?

t_ch: 研发只投入一成预算。
t_en: Only <unbreak>10%</unbreak> of the budget has been invested in R&D.

t_ch: 剩下的九成呢？
t_en: What about the remaining <unbreak>90%</unbreak>?

t_ch: 答案是病毒营销。
t_en: The answer: Viral marketing.

t_ch: 听说你们科室搞了个什么创新咖啡，还赚了不少？
t_en: I heard your department has a new coffee start-up, and it's raking in cash?

t_ch: 哎，小事小事。
t_en: Ah, it's no big deal.

t_ch: 你偷偷告诉我，到底是怎么做到的吧？
t_en: C'mon, tell me your secret. How'd you do it?

t_ch: 其实很简单：我们把研发成本压得很低，把经费花在了别的部分。
t_en: It's actually quite simple: We keep our R&D costs low and spend our budget elsewhere.

t_ch: 别的部分是指？
t_en: By elsewhere, you mean...?

t_ch: 哼哼，这可不兴外传，主要是宣发…其实就是「病毒营销」！
t_en: Hmph, well you can't tell anyone, but it's all about promotion... especially viral marketing!

t_ch: 公告说必须回复收到。
t_en: The notice said that we have to confirm receipt.

t_ch: 但容易把消息刷走……
t_en: But it's too easy for it to get spammed away by other messages...

t_ch: 保持高强度水群就好了。
t_en: Just keep posting in our group chat and everything will be fine.

t_ch: 哦…收到！
t_en: Oh... Duly noted!

t_ch: 你怎么又没回复群消息？群公告一旦更新，就要回复一次「收到」！！！
t_en: Why haven't you replied to the group chat? When the group notice is updated, you have to reply with "Received"!

t_ch: 我们群里那么多人，都回复一个「收到」，关键信息不就被刷上去了？没能及时看群的人很容易错过消息。
t_en: There're so many people replying in the chat with "Received" that the key messages get overwritten. People who don't stay glued to the chat risk missing out.

t_ch: 只要保持高强度水群，就不会错过消息！！！
t_en: Just keep our text threads going at a high intensity and you won't miss out — will you!?

t_ch: …好吧，「收到」。
t_en: ... Alright. "Received."

t_ch: 等我大展宏图！
t_en: Just you wait for my masterpiece!

t_ch: 我真服了……
t_en: I give up...

t_ch: 我都来了这么久了，怎么还没能晋升啊？
t_en: I've been here so long. Why haven't I been promoted yet?

t_ch: 我这辈子不会就这样了吧？
t_en: Am I doomed to do this for the rest of my life?

t_ch: …哎，我真是服了，来之前以为自己是个天才，命中注定的天才。
t_en: Ack... I really am giving up. Before I came here, I had thought I was a genius. A genius chosen by fate.

t_ch: 来了之后才发现我什么都不是…在我最自信的领域，我连黑塔女士的鞋跟都摸不着，呜呜……
t_en: But after I arrived, I realized that I am actually nothing... Madam Herta can squash me with her pinky even in my area of research expertise...

t_ch: 简评一下我的最新情诗。
t_en: Gimme your thoughts about my latest love poem.

t_ch: 「你的声音像闹铃」？
t_en: You mean "Your Voice is Like an Alarm"?

t_ch: 很浪漫吧？很感动吧？
t_en: Isn't it romantic? Are you touched?

t_ch: 很…很感动。
t_en: It's... touching.

t_ch: 我最近又给她写了几首情诗，你帮我看看感觉如何。
t_en: I've written her a few more love poems. Tell me what you think — how does it feel?

t_ch: ……你为什么要把她的声音比作闹铃，把她的身影比作呜呜伯？
t_en: ... Why do you have to compare her voice to an alarm clock — and her figure to a Wubbaboo?

t_ch: 因为我每次听到闹铃，都感觉自己会在一瞬间内头脑清醒，这意味着她就是我的灵感女神。
t_en: Because every time I hear my alarm, my head feels super-clear for a second — which means that she's my muse.

t_ch: 而比作呜呜伯，是为了展示我的学识，毕竟空间站了解这玩意儿的科员可不多。
t_en: And as for Wubbaboos, this demonstrates my knowledge, because not many staff aboard the space station understand this stuff.

t_ch: 那还蛮…蛮有设计感的。
t_en: That's a really... innovative way of coming up with it.

t_ch: 啊？他也太那个了吧？
t_en: Hmm? Is he too... y'know?

t_ch: 做人不能太那个。
t_en: You can't be too much like that. It's not right.

t_ch: 咱们说话也有点那个。
t_en: Even us talking is too... y'know.

t_ch: 等等，这个是哪个？
t_en: Hang on, too... what?

t_ch: 啊？他也太那个了吧？
t_en: Hmm? Is he too... y'know?

t_ch: 就是说啊，做人不能太那个。
t_en: I'm just saying, you can't be too much like that.

t_ch: 不过话说回来，你觉不觉得咱们说话也有点那个。
t_en: But then again, don't you think us even talking is too... y'know?

t_ch: 等等，「那个」是哪个？
t_en: Hang on. What exactly are we talking about?

t_ch: 最近如何？
t_en: How's it going?

t_ch: 老样子。
t_en: Same same.

t_ch: 那你们头儿呢？
t_en: What about your chief?

t_ch: 不太符合常态。
t_en: Acting rather out of it.

t_ch: 咋回事啊，又坏了？
t_en: What's the matter? Broken again?

t_ch: 别急，拍两下就好了。
t_en: Relax. Just give it two slaps and it'll be fine.

t_ch: 呃，我好像忘记保存了。
t_en: Ugh, I think I forgot to save my progress.

t_ch: …喊维修人员过来吧。
t_en: ... Call the maintenance staff over to take a look.

t_ch: 那边不太安全。
t_en: It's not very safe there.

t_ch: 出入多加小心。
t_en: Be careful coming and going.

t_ch: 哎，这个区域好危险。
t_en: Yikes, it's not safe here at all.

t_ch: 好想早点回去……
t_en: I wanna go home now...

t_ch: 我简单说两句……
t_en: Let me say a few words...

t_ch: 大家今天表现很棒，下面我简单说两句——
t_en: Everyone has done very well today. Let me just say a few words here...

t_ch: 首先是实验用具，你们记得……
t_en: First of all, the lab apparatus. You remember...

t_ch: …我刚刚好像听到我的肚子在咕咕叫？
t_en: ...I think I just heard my tummy rumbling.

t_ch: 不，你听错了，那是我的肚子在叫。
t_en: No, you misheard. That's actually MY tummy rumbling.

t_ch: 您放心吧，每次实验我们都会做好分类工作的。
t_en: Don't worry. We categorize every experiment we run.

t_ch: 年轻人真不行啊……
t_en: Youngsters these days really are useless...

t_ch: 别这么严苛嘛。
t_en: Don't be so harsh.

t_ch: 人老咯，带不动咯…我感觉我们科的年轻人啊，哎……
t_en: I'm old and can't carry everyone on my shoulders... It feels like the youngsters in our department are all — *sigh*...

t_ch: 别这么严苛嘛，我看我们科室的孩子都挺不错呀。
t_en: Don't be so harsh. I think the youngsters in our department are all great.

t_ch: 我年轻的时候，做石蜡切片的手艺可比他们差多了。
t_en: When I was their age, I was far worse at paraffin sectioning than they are.

t_ch: 哼，一码归一码，我说的是科研能力，不是做实验的动手能力。
t_en: Hmph, that's not the same. I'm talking about their scientific research capacity, not their dexterity in manual operations.

t_ch: …总之就是很焦虑。
t_en: ...So, I'm really anxious right now.

t_ch: 你当放假不就完了。
t_en: Can't you just treat it as a vacation?

t_ch: 我习惯连轴转了，现在一下子清闲了，反而感到很不安。
t_en: I'm used to working around the clock, but now that I'm free all of a sudden, I have this real sense of restlessness.

t_ch: 这两天始终定不到实验室，哎，总之就是感觉特别焦虑。
t_en: I haven't been able to book a lab the past two days. *Sigh* I'm just feeling extremely anxious about it all.

t_ch: 噢，这有什么，你就当放假不就完了？
t_en: Oh, what's the matter? Why don't you just treat it like a vacation?

t_ch: 而且，你现在急也没用啊，超净台都没有你拿什么做实验？等新设备运到再想吧。
t_en: Besides, there's no point in being anxious. You still need a clean bench to complete the experiments, right? Just wait until the new equipment arrives.

t_ch: 听说你们科在找东西？
t_en: Hey, I heard your department is looking for some things?

t_ch: 哎，别提了……
t_en: *Sigh* Don't mention it, please...

t_ch: 我最近听说，你们应物科在找什么东西，是出什么事了吗？
t_en: Someone told me the Department of Implement Arts is looking for some things. What's up?

t_ch: 实验出了点意外，有个奇物在空间站里到处「逃窜」，大家都在找它。
t_en: There was a bit of an accident. A curio "escaped" during an experiment, and it's currently fleeing all over the space station. Everyone's still looking for it.

t_ch: 听起来还蛮惨的，不过我没做过这种实验，所以想象不到奇物乱窜是什么情况……
t_en: Bummer. I've never run this kind of experiment though, so I can't imagine what it must be like to have something weird scuttling around like that...

t_ch: 哎，让你见笑了。
t_en: *sigh* What an embarrassment.

t_ch: 哥们，这事靠谱吗？
t_en: Dude, is that reliable?

t_ch: 呃，我不好说……
t_en: Um, I can't really say...

t_ch: 哥们，你给我发的那个报告我看过了。
t_en: Dude, I read the report you gave me.

t_ch: 你给我透个底吧，那个星球安全吗？这事到底靠不靠谱？我想去考察考察。
t_en: Gimme the inside scoop! Is that planet safe? Is this business reliable or not? I'd like to go and investigate for myself.

t_ch: 呃，这个…我不好说…因为目前只有文字资料。
t_en: Er, that's... I can't really say... Because there's only written evidence about it at the moment.

t_ch: 我建议你再观望观望吧，要是有了什么实质性进展，我第一个通知你。
t_en: I suggest you just wait and see. If there're any substantial developments, I'll notify you in the first instance.

t_ch: 你们那还有没有……
t_en: Do you still have...

t_ch: 没有，你先把这个理论吃透……
t_en: No, you have to get to grips with this theory first...

t_ch: 我看你早就做完实验了，那正好，分点那个给我，我拿去配胰酶。
t_en: Looks like you finished your experiment ages ago. That's good. Just give some of that to me and I can go make some trypsin.

t_ch: 什么那个？能配胰酶的试剂不少，但你要的是哪个？
t_en: Some what? There are lots of reagents that can make trypsin. Which one do you want?

t_ch: 就…那个溶剂叫什么来着？就是你常用的那个，借我用点呗。
t_en: Just... what's that solvent called again? You know, the one you're always using. Give me some of that.

t_ch: 问就是没有。你还是先把这个理论研究透了，再申请实验吧。
t_en: Don't have any, sorry. You should really get a firm grasp on this theory first, and then apply to do the experiment.

t_ch: 你忘了你上次放错试剂，毁了多少培养皿了？
t_en: Did you forget how many petri dishes you ruined last time by messing up the reagents?

t_ch: 我还是不太明白……
t_en: I still don't really get it...

t_ch: …不是这么推导的。
t_en: ...That's not the right conclusion to derive here.

t_ch: 前辈，我还是不太明白，为什么我算出来的和你算的差这么多？
t_en: I know you're my senior, but I still don't get why my calculation is so different from yours.

t_ch: 应该是模型的问题。我认为你现在这个太复杂了，中间好像丢失了一段数据，结果自然不对。
t_en: I think it's a modeling error. Yours is far too complex, and I think there's a section of missing data in the middle — naturally it's wrong.

t_ch: 咱们科有位前辈，他设计的那个神经网络比你现在用的模型简单。你可以用他的那个试试。
t_en: There's a senior researcher in our department who designed a way simpler neural network than the model you're using. Why don't you try his instead?

t_ch: 好的，等我记一下。
t_en: Alright, let me make a note.

t_ch: 这个舱段确认过了？
t_en: Has this zone been confirmed?

t_ch: 除了故障区域都没问题。
t_en: Yes, this place is all good except for the faulty areas.

t_ch: 主控舱段是没问题了，接下来的呢？都检查完了吗？
t_en: The master control zone is looking good. What's next? Have you checked everything?

t_ch: 嗯，按着操作手册上的流程，全部检查过了。
t_en: Yeah, I've checked over everything according to the manual's workflow.

t_ch: 但我看屏幕上…你看这里，这个舱段你们也确认过了？那怎么还亮着警示灯？
t_en: But on the screen here... look at this. Have you confirmed this zone yet? Why is the warning light still on?

t_ch: 这个地方是故障区域，机组坏了，没法儿接收信号。所以我特意标记了一下。
t_en: This is a faulty area with a broken unit, and it's a dead zone for signals. That's why I've deliberately marked it out.

t_ch: 嗯，那就好。你也别怪我啰嗦，毕竟刚被「军团」入侵过。我们还是谨慎点为好。
t_en: Ah, that's good then. Don't hold it against me for being pedantic. We've only just survived a raid by the Legion. Let's keep going at it with caution.

t_ch: …事情就是这样了！
t_en: ...That's how it went!

t_ch: 我好像也听说过。
t_en: I think I've heard of that too.

t_ch: 听起来还蛮危险的。
t_en: Sounds pretty dangerous.

t_ch: 在那个深夜，我刚轮值完，突然感觉人好冷，心也好冷……
t_en: It was in the middle of the night. I had just finished my shift when I suddenly felt a chill down to my core...

t_ch: …可空间站里不都是恒温的吗？
t_en: ...But doesn't the space station always maintain a constant temperature?

t_ch: 你别打岔！总之就是突然感到很孤独很心寒，所以我就去找「螺中笑声」了。
t_en: Don't cut me off! Anyway, I suddenly felt so lonely and cold, so I went looking for the Crackup Conch.

t_ch: 嗯，毕竟幽默是带走寂寞感的良药嘛…然后呢？
t_en: Mmmm, I guess humor really is the antidote to loneliness... then what?

t_ch: 然后我并没有听到笑话，反而是听到一个声音不断挖苦我。我怀疑是有什么东西躲在门后…总之事情就是这样了，非常恐怖！
t_en: Well, instead of hearing a joke, all I could hear was this voice roasting me. I thought there might be something hiding behind the door... Anyway, that's how it happened. Totally freaky!

t_ch: 我好像听谁说过…说是…「螺中笑声」感染了病毒就异变了？
t_en: I think someone once told me... that the Crackup Conch got infected with some kind of virus?

t_ch: 谁知道呢，总之听起来还蛮危险的。
t_en: Who knows. In any case, it sounds pretty dangerous.

t_ch: 新机组什么时候到？
t_en: When's the new unit arriving?

t_ch: 这得看「公司」那边的安排。
t_en: Depends on the IPC's logistics.

t_ch: 师傅，这要怎么办啊！
t_en: Master, what are we gonna do!?

t_ch: 别急，我看看啊。
t_en: Don't worry. I'll take a look.

t_ch: 师傅，师傅！您快看，跑出来的结果好奇怪啊！这要怎么办啊？
t_en: Master, master! Look here, the result is totally weird! What are we gonna do?

t_ch: 哎哟别急，让我先看看…唔，好像没什么…等等，这是……
t_en: Okay, take it easy. Let me have a look... Well, looks fine to m—hang on. This is...

t_ch: 我说你小子，这串数据还没跑完呢，慌什么。
t_en: Kid, I told you this data string hasn't finished running yet. Don't panic.

t_ch: 我看这图表有点奇怪，所以就…不好意思！
t_en: This graph looked strange, so I... I'm sorry!

t_ch: 砰——你感到一阵天旋地转，耳朵嗡嗡作响。清晰的理性离你远去，只觉得视野里有个模糊的人影在朝这边招手，那就是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吗？
t_en: Bang — You feel a sudden dizziness, your ears ringing loudly. Clarity and reason slip away as you notice a blurred figure waving at you from a distance. Could that be {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 据说翁法罗斯在最繁盛的时候，曾有超过<unbreak>1200</unbreak>只大地兽在这片土地上栖息，多么惊人的数字啊。所以，你知道这意味着什么吗？
t_en: It's said that during its prime, Amphoreus was home to over <unbreak>1,200</unbreak> dromases. What an astounding number! So, do you know what that means?

t_ch: 这里是大地兽乐园！
t_en: This was a paradise for dromases!

t_ch: 每位泰坦要打<unbreak>100</unbreak>只大地兽。
t_en: Each Titan must defeat <unbreak>100</unbreak> dromases.

t_ch: 为什么大地兽当不了泰坦？
t_en: Why couldn't dromases become Titans?

t_ch: …来…这边……
t_en: Come... over here...

t_ch: 噢，天哪，那个人影还在朝你招手，并且变得愈发清晰，你依稀辨认出它正呼唤你过去。
t_en: Oh dear, that figure is waving at you now, growing clearer by the second. You vaguely recognize it as if it's calling you over.

t_ch: 好吧，你决定不再畏惧，人总是会有那么一天的，别害怕——来吧，甜蜜的死亡！
t_en: Fine, you decide not to be afraid anymore. After all, everyone has their day. Don't be scared — come, sweet death!

t_ch: …你…还…活着吗？喂喂……
t_en: ...Are you... still alive? Hey...

t_ch: 活着？如果思考便意味着存在，毫无疑问你是活着的。可刚才明明，你的思绪已经离你远去，你看见塞纳托斯在朝你招手…到底是怎么回事？
t_en: Alive? If to think is to exist, then undoubtedly, you are alive. But just now, your thoughts had clearly drifted far away. You saw Thanatos beckoning to you... What's going on?

t_ch: 哎呀呀呀，真是对不起。这头大地兽发疯跑了出来，撞倒了您，没什么事吧？
t_en: Ah, my apologies! This dromas just went mad and dashed out, knocking you down. Are you alright?

t_ch: 你是…？
t_en: And you are...?

t_ch: 你就是塞纳托斯？
t_en: Are you Thanatos?

t_ch: 刚才是你在呼唤我吗？
t_en: Were you the one calling me just now?

t_ch: 我…嗯，怎么说呢，算是这头大地兽现在的饲养员吧。不好意思，我从云石市集追到云石天宫，才总算赶上它的步伐，可没想到还是出现了受害者。
t_en: I... Well, how should I put it? You could say I'm currently this dromas's caretaker. Sorry about that. I chased it all the way from the Marmoreal Market to the Marmoreal Palace, and I still couldn't catch up to it. But I didn't expect it to cause harm along the way.

t_ch: 好险好险。要是撞到老人就要出大事了，就算踩到奇美拉也很麻烦啊！
t_en: That was close! If it had collided with an elder, it would've been disastrous. Even if it trampled a chimera, it'd be a huge mess!

t_ch: 所以我是被大地兽撞了？
t_en: So I got hit by a dromas?

t_ch: 撞到我就没事了？
t_en: And now it's no big deal?

t_ch: 我看您身体健康，精神抖擞，还有心情和我聊天，肯定没问题！但…哎，这可怎么办啊？
t_en: I see you're in good health, full of energy, and even in the mood to chat with me, so you must be fine! But... oh dear, what am I going to do?

t_ch: 失控的大地兽，在热闹的城邦里狂奔，总有天要出事的。可它的力气太大，工坊的栅栏挡不住它，速度又太快，普通人根本追不上…谁能帮帮我呀？！
t_en: A rampaging dromas running wild in a bustling city-state is bound to cause trouble someday. But it's too strong for the workshop fences to hold it back, and it's too fast for an ordinary person to catch... Who could help me?

t_ch: 很明显，你注意到这位饲养员正偷偷用眼角的余光瞟你，似乎早有打算。
t_en: It's quite obvious that this caretaker is sneaking glances at you, as if he already has something in mind.

t_ch: 想找我麻烦是吧？
t_en: Are you trying to dump this on me?

t_ch: 哎，怎么能算找麻烦，奥赫玛的公民们都知道异邦的客人神通广大，说不准您稍微拜拜{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}，就能想出什么好法子了呢？
t_en: Oh, how could it be considered dumping? The citizens of Okhema all know how capable guests from outlands are. Perhaps if you prayed a bit to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, you might come up with a brilliant solution!

t_ch: 再说，事情可不能这么算了，您被大地兽给狠狠地撞了，当然要赔偿！
t_en: Besides, we can't just let this slide. That dromas hit you hard, so compensation is definitely in order!

t_ch: 但我偏不管！
t_en: But I refuse to deal with this!

t_ch: 哎，可事情不能就这么算了，您被大地兽给狠狠地撞了，当然要赔偿才行。
t_en: Well, we can't just let this slide. That dromas hit you hard, so compensation is definitely in order.

t_ch: 不光是您，我也想要赔偿。就在前几天，我按惯常的时间来到工坊，准备开始今天的工作。您猜怎么着——栏里的大地兽突然多出来了一头！
t_en: It's not just you, even I want compensation! Just a few days ago, as I arrived at the workshop at my usual time to start the day's work, guess what? There was suddenly one more dromas in the pen!

t_ch: 我寻思着这大地兽也不是什么地里的作物，怎么能凭空出现的。可它来都来了，我也不好赶出去，就这么先喂着了。但事情没这么简单……
t_en: I figured, this dromas wasn't exactly a crop from the field, so how could it appear out of thin air? But now that it was there, I couldn't just drive it away, so I've been feeding it for now. But it's not that simple...

t_ch: <size=28>每天固定时候，固定在这条路上，它都要跑上好几个来回！这谁受得了啊？！</size>
t_en: <size=28>At the same time every day, on this very road, it runs back and forth several times! Who can endure this!?</size>

t_ch: 不知道原因吗？
t_en: Don't you know the reason?

t_ch: 正常，现在人都到处发疯。
t_en: Well, it's normal — everyone's going crazy these days.

t_ch: 不瞒您说，以我照顾大地兽这么多年的经验，我猜测啊…<color=#dbc291ff>这头大地兽准是失恋了。</color>
t_en: To tell you the truth, with my years of experience caring for dromases, I suspect... <color=#dbc291ff>this dromas must've had its heart broken.</color>

t_ch: 正当你还在消化这些信息时，那头疯狂的大地兽再次从你们的面前飞奔而过。
t_en: Just as you're trying to process this information, the rampaging dromas dashes past you again.

t_ch: …嗡嗡！
t_en: ...Grumph!

t_ch: 从大地兽的这声嘶吼中，你听出了五分惆怅、三分无奈，还有两分对身旁人类的不屑。好吧…就算是为了赔偿金，你也得想办法搞清楚它的来历。
t_en: From its roar, you can hear five parts sorrow, three parts resignation, and two parts disdain for the humans nearby. Alright... even if it's just for the compensation, you'll need to figure out its origin.

t_ch: 但首先，你需要先让它安静下来。
t_en: But first, you need to calm it down.

t_ch: 「忘记是普通人能做的唯一的事，但是我决定不忘记她——」
t_en: "Forgetting is the only thing ordinary people can do, but for her, I've decided not to —"

t_ch: 听城门口的卫兵说，那头失恋的大地兽最近疯跑的频率越来越高了，还吓到了不少客人。所以，您想到什么好法子了吗？
t_en: The guards at the city gate mentioned that the heartbroken dromas has been running wild more frequently, scaring plenty of visitors. So, have you thought of any solutions?

t_ch: …从它喜欢的食物着手？
t_en: ...Start with its favorite food?

t_ch: …给它演奏音乐试试。
t_en: ...Try playing music for it.

t_ch: …再找只大地兽来就解决了！
t_en: ...Bring in another dromas and call it a day!

t_ch: 大概就这些。
t_en: That's about all I've got.

t_ch: 嗯。听起来没什么问题，好在我们的时间还很多，可以慢慢尝试。
t_en: Hmm, sounds reasonable enough. Luckily, we've got plenty of time to test these methods one by one.

t_ch: 那就拜托您了！要是找到了这头大地兽原本的主人，我非得让他给您道歉！
t_en: I'll leave it to you! If we find this dromas's original owner, I'll make sure they apologize to you properly!

t_ch: 要深深地鞠躬才行！
t_en: Have them bow deeply!

t_ch: 能让他帮我清洗浴池吗？
t_en: Can they help me clean the bathhouse?

t_ch: 让他学奇美拉叫。
t_en: Make them mimic a chimera's call.

t_ch: 行，怎么样都依您！到这个点，它应该返回工坊了，我们先去解决问题吧。
t_en: Sure, whatever you want! By this time, it should've returned to the workshop. Let's head over and deal with it.

t_ch: 俗话说得好：没有一顿红土解决不了的大地兽，要是有，那就再给它来一顿。
t_en: As the saying goes: There's no dromas a meal of redsoil can't handle. If there is, give it another meal.

t_ch: 靠着这位饲养员先生的关系，你从大地兽工坊里弄来了成堆的红土。要是那<unbreak>1200</unbreak>只大地兽全都在场的话，或许还能吃完——可惜在不得。
t_en: Thanks to the caretaker, you manage to procure heaps of redsoil from the Dromas Workshop. If all <unbreak>1,200</unbreak> dromases were present, they might've finished it all — but alas, they're not.

t_ch: （现在该喂给这头大地兽了。）
t_en: (Now it's time to feed this dromas.)

t_ch: 加油！异邦的客人，要带着虔诚的心来认真喂食才行啊！
t_en: You can do it, outlander! You must feed it with a sincere heart!

t_ch: （恭敬地喂食）
t_en: (Feed it respectfully)

t_ch: 求你了，来吃吧——
t_en: Come on, eat this, please —

t_ch: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumph... Grumphhh!

t_ch: 尽管听不懂大地兽的语言，但你似乎感受到了它的喜悦…如果不是错觉的话。
t_en: Although you don't understand the dromas's language, you seem to sense its joy... if it's not just your imagination.

t_ch: （高傲地喂食）
t_en: (Feed it pridefully)

t_ch: 嗟，来食——
t_en: Ho, eat —

t_ch: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡？
t_en: Grumph... Grumphhh?

t_ch: 尽管听不懂大地兽的语言，但你似乎感受到了它对你的不屑…希望这是你的错觉。
t_en: Although you don't understand the dromas's language, you seem to feel its disdain towards you... hopefully, that's just your imagination.

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumphhhh!

t_ch: 失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
t_en: The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.

t_ch: 哎，看来这个办法根本没奏效啊。
t_en: Well, looks it doesn't work at all.

t_ch: 是我做错了什么吗？
t_en: Did I do something wrong?

t_ch: 我还不够虔诚？
t_en: Was I not earnest enough?

t_ch: 不，只是到时间了。去老地方看看吧，它准在那。
t_en: No, it's just that the time has come. Let's check its usual spot. It'll surely be there.

t_ch: …嗡嗡！
t_en: ...Grumph!

t_ch: 你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
t_en: You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.

t_ch: 大地兽疯跑了几圈后，慢悠悠地回到了工坊……
t_en: After a few laps, it leisurely returns to the workshop...

t_ch: …对大地兽说「我爱你」就可以吗？那我很擅长哦。
t_en: ...Would saying "I love you" to the dromas work? I'm pretty good at that.

t_ch: 倒不用做到这个程度，就是对着它弹弹琴，唱唱小曲，让这头大地兽的心情变好。
t_en: No need to go that far. Just play some tunes or sing a little to cheer it up.

t_ch: 加油！我知道你们很会辅助队友，要带着虔诚的心来认真弹唱才行啊！
t_en: Come on! I know you're great at supporting others. Do it sincerely and earnestly!

t_ch: 噢，那我试试吧。
t_en: Alright, I'll give it a shot.

t_ch: 「忘记是普通人能做的唯一的事，但是我决定不忘记她——」
t_en: "Forgetting is the only thing ordinary people can do, but for her, I've decided not to —"

t_ch: 再大点声！
t_en: Louder!

t_ch: 再深情点！
t_en: More emotion!

t_ch: 「离愁时是我视力最差的时候，放眼望去，满街都是她的影子——」
t_en: "When the Parting Hour clouds my vision, everywhere I look, I see her shadow —"

t_ch: …嗡嗡？
t_en: ...Grumph?

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumphhhh!

t_ch: 失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
t_en: The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.

t_ch: 哎，看来这个办法也没用啊。
t_en: Well, looks it doesn't work at all, either.

t_ch: 发生什么事了？为什么这头大地兽听到我的歌声就逃走了，唱得有那么差吗？
t_en: What happened? Why did the dromas run away when I started singing? Was it really that bad?

t_ch: 和你没关系，只是到时间了。去老地方吧。
t_en: No, it's just that the time has come. Let's check its usual spot.

t_ch: …嗡嗡！
t_en: ...Grumph!

t_ch: 你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
t_en: You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.

t_ch: 大地兽疯跑了几圈后，慢悠悠地回到了工坊……
t_en: After a few laps, it leisurely returns to the workshop...

t_ch: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumph... Grumphhh!

t_ch: …嗡嗡？
t_en: ...Grumph?

t_ch: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！呜嗡嗡嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumphhh... Grumphhh! Grumphhhh!

t_ch: 嗡嗡嗡……
t_en: Grumphhh...

t_ch: 加油！全奥赫玛最美的大地兽，要带着虔诚的心来认真讨好它才行啊！
t_en: Keep it up! Okhema's most beautiful dromas deserves your utmost effort to win its heart!

t_ch: …这不是虔诚就能解决的事吧？
t_en: ...This isn't something sincerity can solve, right?

t_ch: 我看它们的进展挺不错的。
t_en: I think they're making progress.

t_ch: …嗡嗡。
t_en: ...Grumph.

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumphhhh!

t_ch: 失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
t_en: The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.

t_ch: 走吧。老地方见。
t_en: Let's go and check the usual spot.

t_ch: …嗡嗡！
t_en: ...Grumph!

t_ch: 你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
t_en: You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.

t_ch: 完了，万策尽了，能用的办法都用过了，可那头失恋的大地兽仍旧义无反顾地在道路上狂奔，不由得让我想起了曾听过的一首民谣……
t_en: It's hopeless — we've tried every idea, and yet the heartbroken dromas continues to sprint down the road with reckless abandon. That reminds me of an old ballad I once heard...

t_ch: 啊，我的脚步跌跌撞撞，只为奔向你——
t_en: Ah, my steps stumble and stagger to run towards you—

t_ch: 说点正经的吧。
t_en: Let's talk about something serious.

t_ch: 很神奇吧，爱情的力量。
t_en: The power of love, isn't it amazing?
